positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a majestic crescent moon rising over a stylized mountain range and a calm, glassy body of water. The moon should emit a soft, ethereal glow, casting deep indigo and ultramarine shadows on the peaks. The silhouette should feature clean, geometric lines and strong contrast, utilizing limited colors: deep navy, slate gray, pale gold for the glow, and accents of teal. The style must be modern graphic design illustration, reminiscent of high-end travel posters, with crisp vector-like lines. Central composition, designed for high print visibility on textiles. Clean edges, symmetry, and sophisticated negative space utilization.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, noise, jpeg compression, ugly, distorted, amateur, messy, gradients (unless controlled glow), low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, signature, logo, watermark, copyright, out of focus
